title: Stephane Nicolet
text: Home * People * Stephane Nicolet Stéphane Nicolet [1] Stéphane Nicolet , a French world-class Othello player, two times vice-world champion in 1996 and 2007 [2] , computer scientist, teacher and researcher affiliated with University of Paris II Panthéon-Assas [3] , and computer Othello and chess programmer. He is primary author of the Othello program Cassio for Macintosh [4] . In 2014, Stéphane Nicolet started to work on Stockfish , and became a primary member of the Stockfish community, contributing in all areas with focus on evaluation , tuning and testing .
